Oxford University Hospitals NHS Foundation Trust
Adult Social Care Team
John Radcliffe Hospital, Headley Way, Oxford, OX3 9DU

5 March 2026

Dear [Redacted],

AMENDMENT TO YOUR CARE AND SUPPORT PLAN — REVIEW REQUIRED

Following a recent review under Section 9 of the Care Act 2014, we are writing to inform you that your current care and support plan is being amended.

From 1 April 2026, your weekly home care visits will be reduced from 14 hours to 7 hours per week. This decision has been made following a reassessment of your eligible care needs.

If you believe this reduction does not adequately meet your assessed needs, you have the right to request a formal review of this decision. You must submit your request in writing to the Adult Social Care Team within 28 days of this letter, by 2 April 2026.

You also have the right to make a formal complaint to the Local Government and Social Care Ombudsman if you remain dissatisfied after our internal review process.

Please contact your named social worker, Sarah Mitchell, on 01865 741166 to discuss this change.

Yours sincerely,
Adult Social Care Team
Oxford University Hospitals NHS Foundation Trust
